< Home >

GET restapi/personal/instantmessages/messagethreads/v1?maxThreadCount={maxThreadCount}&threadPage={threadPage}&maxMessages={maxMessages}

Gets the logged in user's message threads. PersonId is gotten from the authorization (session or oauth)

Supports paging. If paging is not used, it will use a default pageSize on pageIndex 0

The client can specify paging with a combination of UseNewerThan and FromId to be able to page directly from a specified messageId

Request Information

URI Parameters

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
maxThreadCount

Maximum number of threads to get

 integer

None.
threadPage

Page index for threads

 integer

None.
maxMessages

Maximum number of messages to get

 integer

None.

Body Parameters

None.

Response Information

Resource Description

List of InstantMessageThread entities

EntityListOfItslearning.RestApi.Entities.InstantMessageThread
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
EntityArray

Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.InstantMessageThread

None.
Total

integer

None.
CurrentPageIndex

integer

None.
PageSize

integer

None.

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
<EntityList xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <CurrentPageIndex>2</CurrentPageIndex>
  <EntityArray xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itslearning.RestApi.Entities">
    <d2p1:InstantMessageThread>
      <d2p1:CanDelete>true</d2p1:CanDelete>
      <d2p1:CanShowParticipantsPage>true</d2p1:CanShowParticipantsPage>
      <d2p1:ColorSchema>sample string 7</d2p1:ColorSchema>
      <d2p1:Created>2026-03-07T16:36:58Z</d2p1:Created>
      <d2p1:CreatedBy>5</d2p1:CreatedBy>
      <d2p1:CreatedByTeacher>true</d2p1:CreatedByTeacher>

      <d2p1:HasInactiveParticipants>true</d2p1:HasInactiveParticipants>

      <d2p1:InstantMessageThreadId>1</d2p1:InstantMessageThreadId>
